# Harshit Agarwal | Portfolio & Research

> Fullstack Developer & System Architect specialized in AI, Scalable Systems, and Immersive Web Experiences.

## Profile
- **Role**: Founding SDE & System Architect
- **Location**: India
- **Education**: B.Tech CSE @ KIIT (9.3 CGPA)
- **Specialties**: Distributed Systems, Generative AI, Computer Vision, Cross-platform Mobile (Flutter).

## Core Experience

### FamCARE (April 2026 - Present)
**Fullstack Architect & Lead**
- Architected a modular FastAPI backend and 3 Flutter apps.
- Engineered modular monolith with 15+ decoupled services.
- Optimized deployment velocity by 70% via CI/CD.
- Handled 2,000+ requests/minute with 100% success rate.

### endorphind (Jan 2026 - Present)
**Founding SDE (AI & Systems)**
- Engineered Generative Video AI pipelines (Wan 2.1, LatentSync).
- Developed custom ComfyUI nodes for automated media production.
- Leading platform technical scoping and managing SDE teams.

### shoppin' (Dec 2024 - Nov 2025)
**Founding ML Engineer (AI/Infra)**
- Built multimodal ML pipelines for 3-4 crore items.
- Deployed CLIP/VLLM systems on AWS SageMaker.
- Architected AWS EKS clusters with Terraform and GitOps.

## Key Projects

### WHAM! OTT
- Hybrid video engine (H264/HLS) with immersive "Living Comic Book" design.
- Tech: React 18, Vite, FastAPI, Supabase.

### PreviouslyOn
- Social TV tracking app with Gemini AI recommendations.
- Tech: Next.js, Supabase.

### ORB-SLAM3 Research
- Accurate Open-Source Library for Visual, Visual-Inertial and Multi-Map SLAM.
- Presented at NISER SMLAB TALKS.

## Technical Skills
- **Languages**: Python, C/C++, Go, JS/TS, Kotlin, C#.
- **Frameworks**: NextJS, React, Flutter, FastAPI, PyTorch, TensorFlow.
- **Cloud/DevOps**: AWS, Docker, K8s, Terraform, CI/CD.
- **Databases**: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Firebase.
